hypothesis: A simple fast/slow SMA crossover on M15 will produce a steady stream of trades across XAUUSD, GER40, and US500, proving the scaffold can generate signals and fills end-to-end. This is a diagnostic baseline — if this does not trade, the issue is infrastructure, not strategy.

regime_filter.purpose: Only skip the bottom 10% deadest-of-dead volatility bars. Kept intentionally loose to validate trade flow.

diagnostic_intent: Baseline smoke test — must produce >=200 trades per symbol/TF over 4.5y IS window. If it does not, halt and debug scaffold before other candidates are meaningful.
